title: portulaca meyeri var. rodrigoi
intro: Portulaca meyeri var. rodrigoi, also known as the Rodriguez's purslane, is a variant of the Portulaca meyeri plant, which is a type of succulent herb in the Portulacaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and protect cells from damage. The health benefits of Portulaca meyeri var. rodrigoi include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
